# Third-party binaries

## MediaMTX

The Android APK bundles MediaMTX `v1.19.2` for arm64.

Source project: <https://github.com/bluenviron/mediamtx>

Release asset used to create `app/src/main/jniLibs/arm64-v8a/libmediamtx.so`:

```text
https://github.com/bluenviron/mediamtx/releases/download/v1.19.2/mediamtx_v1.19.2_linux_arm64.tar.gz
```

Release asset SHA256:

```text
562f419912a8668c18216a9e8c95359ec82fbb754e4a44e2953ef62b98eec688
```

Bundled executable SHA256:

```text
5bdaf5ba8bcb8e2a502f5cf96ee8baf39d11cfc257f12ebac304f4b0307c7c92
```

License: MIT, copied in `third_party/LICENSE.mediamtx`.
